message:
fix(codegen): Prevent builder state accumulation in recursive closures

Changed all getBody() calls to getBodyAndClear() in recursive.zig to prevent
builder content from accumulating across multiple generation phases.

Before: b2.getBody() -> b3.getBody() contained BOTH outputs (accumulation)
After: b2.getBodyAndClear() -> b3.getBodyAndClear() clears between phases

Fixes duplicate code generation in test_call (duplicate var declarations and
duplicate pub fn call declarations).

Result: test_call moves from duplicate declaration error to new errors
(undeclared identifiers f, kwargs, allocator).
